summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MoneyInsights finance tracking MVP. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI functional with successful integration between frontend and backend.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Backend API initialization and default categories creation
Account CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Category CRUD operations with default category protection
Transaction CRUD operations with balance updates
Upload page functionality and sample CSV download
